children.label: A
children.text: the number of national security letters received, reported in bands of 1000 starting with 0–999;

children.label: B
children.text: the number of customer selectors targeted by national security letters, reported in bands of 1000 starting with 0–999;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of orders or directives received, combined, under this chapter for contents, reported in bands of 1000 starting with 0–999;

children.label: D
children.text: the number of customer selectors targeted under orders or directives received, combined, under this chapter for contents, reported in bands of 1000 starting with 0–999;

children.label: E
children.text: the number of orders received under this chapter for noncontents, reported in bands of 1000 starting with 0–999; and

children.label: i
children.text: subchapter III;

children.label: ii
children.text: subchapter IV with respect to applications described in section 1861(b)(2)(B) of this title; and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: iii
children.text: subchapter IV with respect to applications described in section 1861(b)(2)(C) of this title.1

children.label: A
children.text: the number of national security letters received, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499;

children.label: B
children.text: the number of customer selectors targeted by national security letters, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of orders or directives received, combined, under this chapter for contents, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499;

children.label: D
children.text: the number of customer selectors targeted under orders or directives received, combined, under this chapter for contents, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499;

children.label: E
children.text: the number of orders received under this chapter for noncontents, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499; and

children.label: F
children.text: the number of customer selectors targeted under orders received under this chapter for noncontents, reported in bands of 500 starting with 0–499.

children.label: A
children.text: the total number of all national security process received, including all national security letters, and orders or directives under this chapter, combined, reported in bands of 250 starting with 0–249; and

children.label: B
children.text: the total number of customer selectors targeted under all national security process received, including all national security letters, and orders or directives under this chapter, combined, reported in bands of 250 starting with 0–249.

children.label: A
children.text: the total number of all national security process received, including all national security letters, and orders or directives under this chapter, combined, reported in bands of 100 starting with 0–99; and

children.label: B
children.text: the total number of customer selectors targeted under all national security process received, including all national security letters, and orders or directives under this chapter, combined, reported in bands of 100 starting with 0–99.

children.heading: Period of time covered by reports
children.label: b Period of time covered by reports
A
children.text: relating to national security letters for the previous 180 days; and

children.label: B
children.text: relating to authorities under this chapter for the 180-day period of time ending on the date that is not less than 180 days prior to the date of the publication of such report, except that with respect to a platform, product, or service for which a person did not previously receive an order or directive (not including an enhancement to or iteration of an existing publicly available platform, product, or service) such report shall not include any information relating to such new order or directive until 540 days after the date on which such new order or directive is received.
A report described in paragraph (3) of subsection (a) shall include only information relating to the previous 180 days.

A report described in paragraph (4) of subsection (a) shall include only information for the 1-year period of time ending on the date that is not less than 1 year prior to the date of the publication of such report.

children.heading: Other forms of agreed to publication
children.label: c Other forms of agreed to publication
children.text: Nothing in this section prohibits the Government and any person from jointly agreeing to the publication of information referred to in this subsection in a time, form, or manner other than as described in this section.

children.heading: Contents
children.label: 1 Contents
children.text: The term “contents” has the meaning given that term under .section 2510 of title 18

children.heading: National security letter
children.label: 2 National security letter
children.text: The term “national security letter” has the meaning given that term under .section 1873 of this title
